## How tested
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `npm run --prefix sdk build`

## Security checklist
- [ ] Auth boundaries reviewed
- [ ] Storage/schema impacts documented
- [ ] No secrets committed

## Maintainer checklist
- [ ] Changelog/update docs if needed
- [ ] Roadmap/milestone link included
